title: Buttery Aerated British Mascarpone Trifle
description: A nostalgic British dessert featuring mascarpone, miso-marinated fruits, and a buttery aerated sponge cake.
instructions: Butter a 20cm round cake pan and line the bottom with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, whisk together mascarpone cheese, caster sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract until smooth.
In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, and granulated sugar.
Add the dry ingredients to the mascarpone mixture and whisk until combined.
Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan and smooth the top.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 5 minutes, then transfer it to a wire rack to cool completely.
In a small bowl, whisk together miso paste and heavy cream until smooth.
Chop the fresh blueberries and strawberries and mix them with the miso cream.
Split the cooled cake into two layers and place one layer on a serving plate.
Spread the mascarpone mixture over the cake layer, followed by the miso-marinated fruits.
Top with the remaining cake layer and dust with powdered sugar.
Chill the trifle in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
